events.label: tool result
events.text: File created successfully at: /app/answer.json (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

events.label: assistant
events.text:
Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`.

**Fault:** Schrader cores left in during evacuation restrict flow through the service ports, so the system can't reach a true deep vacuum even if the gauge (upstream of the cores) looks fine — moisture and non-condensables likely remain trapped, risking acid formation and compressor/TXV damage.

**Verdict:** `fail`, `risk: high` — non-compliant per EPA 608/ACCA evacuation practice. Corrective path: recover charge, pull cores with a core-removal tool, re-evacuate to spec (verified with a decay/hold test), then reinstall cores and recharge.
